title: Expropriation; proceedings
doc_html:
§65.  Expropriation; proceedings

This right of expropriation shall be exercised in the same manner, by the same proceedings, and under the same limitations now imposed by law on railroads and other quasi-public corporations; except through those townships, sections, or properties that are now occupied by irrigation canals.
doc_text:
§65.  Expropriation; proceedings
This right of expropriation shall be exercised in the same manner, by the same proceedings, and under the same limitations now imposed by law on railroads and other quasi-public corporations; except through those townships, sections, or properties that are now occupied by irrigation canals.
